TuringResearch Docs

Local-first static docs. No deployment or cloud service required.

Overview Quickstart Concepts Original Repo Parity Public Demo Docs / Dashboard Plugin / MCP Split Repos Security / Privacy FAQ Roadmap

Split Repos

v1.5 prepares manual split execution packs. It does not automatically create GitHub child repositories or upload data.

Planned Manual Packs

  • main docs and public demo bundle;
  • vggt-case repo manual pack;
  • examples repo manual pack;
  • no-deploy release bundle fallback.

Boundary

  • No automatic GitHub repository creation.
  • No private data upload.
  • No automatic release publishing.
  • No PyPI publishing.
  • Human review required before any split action.

  • ../../docs/split-ready-bundles.md
  • ../../docs/v1.0.0-split-readiness-summary.md
  • ../../docs/v1.5.0-final-scope.md
